g.text: Failure Case: Op 1 Fails, Subsequent Cancelled

ol.li: If an SQE in a chain fails (res < 0), the link is broken.
The kernel skips submission of all remaining SQEs in the current chain.
Every skipped SQE results in a CQE with res = -ECANCELED.
User-space must identify the first error in the sequence.

ul.li: n_submitted: Count of SQEs sharing the link.
first_error: Captured from the first CQE where res < 0 AND res != -ECANCELED.
